title: Frasgle and the Sticky Situation
summary: When Mickey, Minnie, and Mole encounter a mysterious, multi-colored creature named Frasgle in the forest, they find him in a very sticky situation. After accidentally napping under a sappy pine tree, Frasgle's beautiful fur is matted with gooey pine sap. The group of friends attempts everything from brushing to licking to shaking, but the sap won't budge. After learning how to communicate love to one another, they decide to take Frasgle to a local pond. Despite being nervous about the cold water, Frasgle takes the plunge, successfully washing away the sap and celebrating his cleanliness with his new friends before they all head home.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: [Sound effects]

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [Laughter]

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What did you say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, do you want to be Frasgle when you...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, do you want to pretend to be Frasgle?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, there's our stars. Um, you mean like this? [Loud roar]

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, like that. But right now I want you to be my daddy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I'd love to be your daddy.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Daddy, could you tell the story please?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yes, of course.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Tell it about Mickey, Minnie, Mole. Mickey and Minnie and Mole. Could you try?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, I'll try. Now let's look up at the stars and think about some ideas for stories.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Once upon a time, Mickey and Minnie and Mole were walking through the forest when in the middle of the path, they saw a strange, fluffy, furry, fuzzy creature.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, keep telling the story and you'll find out what it is.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That's right, we'll find out what it is. Mickey and Minnie and Mole walked up and they said to themselves, "What is that fluffy, fuzzy, furry creature right there?" And just at that moment, you know what happened?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The fluffy, fuzzy, furry creature said something, but it was not a word. It was this: [Roar]. But what did that word mean? They'd never heard that before.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was Frasgle!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: But Mickey and Minnie and Mole, they'd never met Frasgle before. They didn't know Frasgle's language. And Mickey said, "Oh, hello. My name's Mickey. What's your name?" And you know what Frasgle said?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [Laughs] I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: He said, [Roar]. And Minnie said, "Oh dear, are you okay? You're making some funny sounds." And you know what Frasgle said then?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [Laughs] I don't know. [Loud Roar].

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then Mole said, "Oh my, I've never met a creature like you. Now, I wonder if I could try to speak your language." And so you know what Mole said? [Small roar/grunt]. Which wasn't quite right. And so Frasgle corrected Mole. He said, [Roar].

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then Mickey noticed something, which was that Frasgle had a problem with his fur.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What was it?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: His fur was very yucky because it was all sticky because Frasgle had taken a nap under a pine tree and all of the pine sap had gone into his beautiful long fluffy blue fur and stuck it all together.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, not blue fur, orange fur.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, excuse me. Of course, Frasgle is orange, you're right.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. And he's yellow and he's black and white and grey and teal colors.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, he's orange and black and white and grey and teal? I didn't know that.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, Frasgle was very colorful, but also on this day in particular, he was not just fluffy and fuzzy, he was also unfortunately very sticky.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Maybe you could take a bath. Nope, not a bath. You're far too wash off. Shake... no.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, Frasgle was trying to shake. He said, [Roar] and he also shook his fur at the same time. But the sticky gooey sap didn't shake off. And Mickey and Minnie turned to each other and said, "My gosh, how can we help this poor creature? We'll have to ask it what it wants us to do. How can we help you, creature?" And you know what Frasgle said?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: [Laughs] I don't know. He said this: [Roar].

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Minnie said, "Hmm, we're gonna..."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hey, Frasgle, I'm so sticky too. I take a bath. [Claps].

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Frasgle said to that: [Roar]. Oh, and then Minnie said, "Wait a minute. I think I'm starting to understand Frasgle. I think that one meant 'Yeah, okay, I'd like to have a bath too.'" And Frasgle said: [Roar/Gurgle]. And Mickey said, "I think that means you're right."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Frasgle, I have a noise for you: Zararar, Zararar!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then Frasgle did something new. That really caught Frasgle's attention. And you know what he said this time? Zararar roar! Zararar roar! And then Mole turned to Isabella and said, "Isabella, you got Frasgle to say something different! But what does that mean?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It means... I love you!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: That's such a nice thing to say. "Zararar roar!" said the Mole, and Frasgle said it back: "Zararar roar!" And now everyone said I love you to each other, which was so nice. But then Mickey and Minnie said, "But wait! We need to get this creature cleaned up." And Frasgle said: [Roar], which means yes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so Minnie said, "Wait! I have an idea. Frasgle could take a dust bath! Just like the birds. They bathe in a whole lot of dust, and then that brushes off and then they're all clean." And you know what Frasgle said? [Loud long roar/shriek]. And that means "No thank you, I don't like dust baths."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so Mickey said, "Hmm, maybe we need another idea. How can we clean up Frasgle?"

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hmm, so everyone stood around thinking a little bit. What are some other ways, gosh? Hmm.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: You could brush yourself off like this.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh. And Frasgle said: [Roar]. That means, oh, that's an interesting idea.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And lick off your mouth well like this. [Licking sounds].

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Frasgle went: [Roar]. I'll try it. And Frasgle went lick, lick, lick, brush, brush, brush. And a little bit of the sticky came off, but he was still really sticky. And so then Mole said...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And you just shake, shake, shake, shake, shake! [Shaking sounds].

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Shake, shake, shake, shake, shake! And Frasgle said: [Roar], which means okay, I'll try that. And he went shake, shake, shake, shake, shake! But you know what happened? The yucky sticky pine sap just went flying everywhere! And there was still a lot on him. And so then Mickey said, "You know, I have an idea! We were on our way... to the pond!"

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so Minnie said, "Oh, that's right! Frasgle, would you like to go for a lovely swim with us?" And Frasgle said: [Roar], which means okay. And so they all continued walking along down the path until they got to a beautiful little pond.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And it had a little wooden dock floating on it. So they walked out on the dock. And first Mickey jumped in: splash! And then Minnie jumped in: splash! And then Mole jumped in: sploosh! Because he was small, so he made a little sploosh. But then Frasgle walked up and said: [Loud Roar].

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And you know what that meant? Mole said, "Oh yeah, I got it. He meant 'Um, I'm a little worried that the water's too cold.' But you know what, Frasgle? The water's just fine. You could jump right in."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Um, and then Frasgle said: [Roar]. And Mole said, "Oh, he's a little bit nervous, I guess. How can we help him not feel nervous about jumping in?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Keep telling the story! Keep telling the story!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then Frasgle said: [Roar]. And that meant, "Okay, I'll just try it." And he jumped in, and you know what sound it made? Kersploosh! It made a huge splashing sound! And then they all swam around happily in the pond, and very gradually, the yucky sticky pine sap dissolved out of Frasgle's fur.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And he was all clean again! And then they swam over back to the dock and climbed right out and got dried off. And then what did they do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Went home!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They all went home. The end.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Now I think...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now let's do little shadow puppets!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, okay.

characters.name: Mickey
characters.description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

characters.name: Minnie
characters.description: A wise veteran of briny depths and interstellar frontiers, Mickey’s resourceful mouse companion and confidant to the Princess of Mouseland guides Izzy and Hattie with a glowing lantern and ingenious Mystery Mousketools. Having recently breathed life into a towering guardian of interlocking bricks, this intrepid traveler now points the way toward the mountain’s peak, pausing to investigate the savory aroma of bacon-scented mushrooms while serving as a compassionate friend whose seasoned instincts help decipher Frasgle’s complex roars and sounds.

characters.name: Mole
characters.description: A resourceful, perpetually humming mole with an impossibly long name, this polite and intrepid mariner serves as a bridge between worlds, translating Frasgle’s unique tongue and guiding the way to the hidden Underground Library. Whether managing rocket controls with wide-eyed curiosity, unraveling treehouse mysteries, or sharing the magic of special Legos, he encourages his companions to embrace the unknown between tending his dandelion yard and baking fragrant banana bread. A lover of both wriggly worms and sweet blueberries, he sings whimsical songs of carnabee sharks and drives a noisy dark brown car, remaining firmly hesitant about boarding giant robots even as he coaxes his friends toward bold new adventures.

characters.name: Frasgle
characters.description: An enthusiastic blur of multi-colored fluff, this alien assistant maintains the ship’s batteries with sticky, sap-coated precision. Though their only mode of communication is a series of thunderous roars, their dedication to the vessel’s power cells is as unmistakable as the fragrant, resinous trail they leave throughout the engine room.

characters.name: Isabella
characters.description: A towering Dimatar scholar and alchemist of Atsukeeseet, Mama Izzy is a clever kiddo at heart and a steadfast guardian of rooftop gardens and intricate dollhouses. Gifted with the power of flight, she navigates the open heights with aquatic grace, her massive frame often shielded by a special protective metal that glimmers even as she descends into the shadows. As a resourceful quartermaster, she employs red flashlights, gold-laced slimes, and pipe cleaners to mend a Lanternshark’s failing light, yet her generosity remains her hallmark; she freely shares her vast library, brokers homes for dragons, and teaches others to find the resonance in their own voices. Her most profound magic resides in her vast, soft blanket—a sanctuary of ultimate coziness—where she remains a brave, quick-witted protector to all who honor her singular request for absolute silence.

places.name: The Forest
places.description: Cloaking the surface of the green planet in a vast mantle of dense greenery, this whispering woodland serves as the lush setting of the 'Forest Friends' chronicle. It is a realm where creatures play eternal hide-and-seek between Hattie’s cozy clinic and the ancestral cradle of Finn’s companions. Along magical trails where Hattie and the Pakruder Worm harvest hat-making ingredients, winding paths veil secret gopher tunnels and hidden mole cottages, forming the essential route toward the wizard's castle. While its sun-drenched threshold remains a sanctuary for the Rainbow Giraffe and Mama Bird, the deeper, darker thickets harbor a somber mystery; it was within these sprawling, uncharted depths—the same eerie expanse where the sick creature was first spotted and Mossy was discovered—that Mole recently vanished into the shadows.

places.name: Pine Tree
places.description: Tucked into the aromatic thickets behind the Mouse Castle, this landmark is the celebrated site where the lost rainbow ball was finally recovered and the very spot where Frasgle’s deep slumber resulted in a coat hopelessly matted with amber-sticky sap.

places.name: Pond
places.description: A refreshing body of water where the friends go to swim and wash off the pine sap.

places.name: Wooden Dock
places.description: A floating platform on the pond where the characters jump into the water.

places.name: Home
places.description: A sanctuary of restorative rest where weary creators retire after the day’s long labors of drawing, this haven is destined to become the permanent hearth for all friends once the blight of Frasgle has been purged and the land is clean again.
